message.content:
@startuml
title AI takes a turn

participant "Controller" as C1
participant "Controller" as C2
participant ": AIController" as AC1
participant ": AIController" as AC2

AC1 ..> AC1 : Step()

AC1 ..> AC2 : loop [for all Robot r in robots]
    AC2 ..> AC1 : HandleRobot(r)
    AC1 ..> AC2 : loop [for all Robot r in robots]
        AC2 ..> AC1 : HandleRobot(r)
    end
    AC1 ..> AC2 : loop [for all Robot r in robots]
        AC2 ..> AC1 : HandleRobot(r)
    end
end

AC1 ..> AC2 : loop [for all TeleportGate t in teleporters]
    AC2 ..> AC1 : HandleTeleportGate(t)
    AC1 ..> AC2 : loop [for all TeleportGate t in teleporters]
        AC2 ..> AC1 : HandleTeleportGate(t)
    end
    AC1 ..> AC2 : loop [for all TeleportGate t in teleporters]
        AC2 ..> AC1 : HandleTeleportGate(t)
    end
end

AC1 ..> AC2 : loop [for all Ufo u in ufos]
    AC2 ..> AC1 : HandleUfo(u)
    AC1 ..> AC2 : loop [for all Ufo u in ufos]
        AC2 ..> AC1 : HandleUfo(u)
    end
    AC1 ..> AC2 : loop [for all Ufo u in ufos]
        AC2 ..> AC1 : HandleUfo(u)
    end
end

AC2 ..> C1 : loop [for all Robot r in robots]
    C1 ..> AC2 : loop [for all Robot r in robots]
        AC2 ..> C1 : HandleRobot(r)
    end
    C1 ..> AC2 : loop [for all Robot r in robots]
        AC2 ..> C1 : HandleRobot(r)
    end
    C1 ..> AC2 : loop [for all Robot r in robots]
        AC2 ..> C1 : HandleRobot(r)
    end
end

AC2 ..> C1 : loop [for all TeleportGate t in teleporters]
    C1 ..> AC2 : loop [for all TeleportGate t in teleporters]
        AC2 ..> C1 : HandleTeleportGate(t)
    end
    C1 ..> AC2 : loop [for all TeleportGate t in teleporters]
        AC2 ..> C1 : HandleTeleportGate(t)
    end
    C1 ..> AC2 : loop [for all TeleportGate t in teleporters]
        AC2 ..> C1 : HandleTeleportGate(t)
    end
end

AC2 ..> C1 : loop [for all Ufo u in ufos]
    C1 ..> AC2 : loop [for all Ufo u in ufos]
        AC2 ..> C1 : HandleUfo(u)
    end
    C1 ..> AC2 : loop [for all Ufo u in ufos]
        AC2 ..> C1 : HandleUfo(u)
    end
    C1 ..> AC2 : loop [for all Ufo u in ufos]
        AC2 ..> C1 : HandleUfo(u)
    end
end

@enduml
